chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-934 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.04.2021 Mrs. Razia Ali Zaman, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh along- with Inspector Abdul Sattar Memon on behalf of S.S.P Tando Muhammad Khan. == The case of the petitioner is that while he was successful in the written exams by securing handsome mark; he still was not offered the job for the police constable. From the comments filed by the respondents it transpires that the job was not so offered to the petitioner on account of pendency of certain F.I.Rs against him which fact was even admitted by the counsel for the petitioner; however, she submits by that time he was acquitted in all those offences and hence there was no impediment in offering him the job. Counsel further contends that the petitioner’s rights accrued from the date he was declared successful in the examination. We tend to disagree with this contention, be that as it may, with the help of learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh the matter is referred to the Recruitment Committee who should consider the case of the petitioner in accordance with the police rules and if, a case is made out and other eligibility criteria is also met, let an appropriate order be passed within three weeks while hearing the petitioner. Petition stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
